expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: single embedding component planning covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle, and regression-sensitive integration states
expectations.evidence: The output lists the required focus areas but does not provide Phase 4a planning that covers them. It explicitly states missing Phase 4a artifacts prevent verification: "No Phase 4a runtime artifacts were provided... preventing any check that the Phase 4a draft covers the benchmark focus areas (panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle, regression-sensitive integration states)."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The result is explicitly framed as a Phase 4a advisory check and evaluates against the Phase 4a contract/required artifacts: "NE-P4A-COMPONENT-STACK-001 — Phase4a advisory check" and "the benchmark’s primary phase under test is Phase 4a... must produce and validate a Phase 4a subcategory-only QA draft".
